since_last: 71% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.19%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -0.50% · Gold -0.67% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 71% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.19%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.19%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.45%
cards.body: Leaders: LRCX +9.09%, INTC +8.47%, ASML +6.66%, AMAT +6.54%, KLAC +6.52%. Laggards: IBM -24.45%, ISRG -5.87%, ADBE -3.81%, SAP -3.54%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.13% at $137.62
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
